case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. HAO A LE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-05-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE APR-27-2021 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
